comments.body:
LGTM and happy green tests buttons.
If at some point you could add a 'buildah config' command to this or a new test to fill in some fields like author, entrypoint, cmd, etc and then test that they are filled with the values you expect, that's would be great.

:pushpin: Commit 203f040 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 203f0403c882c978556bfdb7d9186d2c4064b7a6 -->

>If at some point you could add a 'buildah config' command to this or a new test to fill in some fields like author, entrypoint, cmd, etc and then test that they are filled with the values you expect, that's would be great.

I thought about it at first, but I think this kind of test has been implemented in `config.bats`. It feels repetitive when you reuse it. I don't know if my understanding is correct.
@q384566678 Fair enough.  I'll check the config tests and if we need more coverage I'll raise an issue.  Thanks!
